decision_reason: Retained as a diagnostic/default-available verifier mode: exact AR holds and B=3/B=5 cycle cost improves, but MTP remains below AR and decode_batched is graph-off-only pending a stable split-count graph bucket.

implementation.graph_note: decode_batched is graph-off only; split count is selected from the current verifier position bucket.

attention_kernel_calls_per_pass.note: new count is two decode kernels per full-attention layer: batch GQA context plus batch reduce-gate; each launch covers all verifier rows via grid.z=rows

title: Small-B decode-shaped full-attention verifier primitive
